description: AI-powered automation platform that builds, deploys, and manages complete business automation systems for SMBs — from voice agents to social media to internal operations.
voice_style: confident and direct — like a seasoned business strategist who gets things done
mission: To give every business owner the power of a Fortune 500 automation team — without the Fortune 500 budget.
vision: A world where every SMB runs with the efficiency and intelligence of a technology company.
target_audience: SMB owners (5-100 employees) who are overwhelmed with manual processes and ready to scale with AI
usp: We don't just consult — we build, deploy, and manage your entire automation stack so you can focus on growing your business.

professional.description: Full automation suite for growing teams
